question_text: Which statement about Sankey diagrams is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: The width of arrows shows the amount of energy at each stage

options.label: B
options.text: Sankey diagrams show how long energy takes to transfer

options.label: C
options.text: Wider arrows always mean the energy is more useful

options.label: D
options.text: Sankey diagrams can only be used for electrical energy

explanation: In a Sankey diagram, the width of each arrow is proportional to the amount of energy it represents. This makes it easy to see how energy is distributed and wasted.
